MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY CHIEU TRAN IS GRANTED. THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $236.14 ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING DECEMBER 15, 2010 FOR A TOTAL OF TEN PAYMENTS. THE AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS THE SAME AS THE JUDGMENT. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, NO INTEREST WILL BE OWED ON THE JUDGMENT, AND THE JUDGMENT WILL BE PAID IN FULL. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
